reviews.comment:
El restaurante que esta dentro de lo que sería el hotel,  es increíble lo bien y barato que se come. Super recomendable,  ojala todos los ACA tengan los restaurantes como este.

(Translated by Google)
The restaurant inside the hotel is incredibly good and inexpensive. Highly recommended; I wish all ACA hotels had restaurants like this.
